bio: Failed art student; successful Humanities major.
Worked a handful of very different jobs. Same pattern each time: hand me a mess, I'll sort it out.
Never stopped making things on the side. Not attached to any one medium.
Live in Asheville, NC with my boyfriend and our corgi Frank.
Watch a lot of movies and TV. Ran a review site in college. That's me.
contact_sub: Fun, cheap, interesting — pick two, and I'll find the third.
